description_long: This bungalow is nestled within a dense cluster of tall evergreen trees, creating a secluded and natural setting. The structure features a low, horizontal profile with a flat or gently sloped roof, and its exterior is finished in a combination of light-colored walls and wooden accents. A prominent entry pathway leads to the main entrance, flanked by landscaped greenery and a wooden deck or porch area. Large windows are visible, allowing for ample natural light and views of the surrounding forest. The property includes a mix of manicured and wild vegetation, with the house partially obscured by the trees from several angles. The overall impression is of a modern, nature-integrated residence designed for privacy and tranquility.
description: A modern bungalow surrounded by dense evergreen trees, featuring a flat roof, wooden accents, and a prominent entry pathway with a porch.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entrance, wooden deck, and the house framed by a thick line of trees.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the house partially hidden by trees, with the roofline and some windows visible through the foliage.
description_view_2: Rear view shows the back of the bungalow, mostly obscured by trees, with only the roof and some wall sections visible.
description_view_3: Angled side view highlights the integration of the house with the surrounding trees and a glimpse of the porch area.
